_info: Raw API responses — overwritten on each new analysis

step_1_vision_api.caption: a logo with blue and white letters

dense_captions.text: a logo with blue and white letters
a white letter in a blue circle

logo.inside_shape: Z is inside a navy blue circle, C is inside a light teal circle
logo.relative_size: medium, occupies about 25% of image width

step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows the ZONNIC logo in navy blue, with the C encircled by a light teal halo. The Z is inside a navy blue circle. The background is solid white, and there are no regulatory or additional text elements present.

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The ZONNIC logo is correctly presented with the C halo in the right colour and proportions, and all brand colours and typography are compliant. However, the image is missing all required regulatory elements: the bilingual nicotine warning at the top, the 18+ icon, and the risk communication text at the bottom. These are critical legal requirements for any marketing asset and must be added for compliance.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image. Both English and French warnings are missing.
The 18+ age restriction icon is not present anywhere in the image.
Risk communication text is not present at the bottom of the image.
The ZONNIC logo is clearly visible and correctly constructed.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
The C has a circular halo in the correct light teal colour, sized and shaped properly.
Logo is unmodified, no gradients in text, no outlines, no distortion, no stacking.
Background is solid white, not a gradient or image.
No gradient background is present, so gradient rules do not apply.
Logo-only content on a white background is acceptable for brand assets.
Only approved brand colours (navy blue, light teal, white) are used.
Bold sans-serif font is used, matching Santral style. No additional text or NRT lockup present.
No grey gradient background is present, so these rules do not apply.
Clear space around the logo is sufficient, no elements intrude.
Halo does not blend into background, flavour matches, logo not placed in shapes over images.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the image, including both English and French statements.
violations.evidence: No warning text found at the top.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: The 18+ age restriction icon is missing.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ icon at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: Risk communication text is missing at the bottom.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements are missing from their designated positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top, and the risk communication and 18+ icon at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No regulatory elements found at top or bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warnings at the top of the image.
